_doc: Phase 5 behavioral-cloning training config. Knob choices justified in 'notes'.
Edit deliberately — every value here is load-bearing for Phase 6 training.

press_pos_weight_rationale: Hit-window labels include the full duration of sliders + spinners (not just
heads), so positives dominate. To prevent the model from collapsing to 'always
History: 0.3 (1 session), 0.56 (3 sessions, 64.2%), 0.69 (8 sessions, 59.1%), 0.72 (13 sessions, 58.0%), 0.57 (26 sessions, 63.6%).
label_window_ms_rationale: Phase 3 clock-fit residual sigma was 46 ms on the main play segment.
+/-60 ms ~= 1.5 sigma — minimum safe window that does not mislabel hit frames as no-press.
frame_resolution_rationale: Model input is 80x60 (W x H). This matches Neuro's documented vision input and
preserves the osu! playfield's 4:3 aspect ratio (square 96x96 squashed it).
Capture pipeline stores 96x96 PNG-equivalent frames; dataset resizes to 80x60
via PIL.BILINEAR at build/load time. 80x60 is a clean 16x downsample from the
1280x960 capture region and yields smaller activations / fewer vision params
(~427K vs ~525K at 96x96) while keeping the model in the 750K-1M target band.
